zh.lifeSummary: 當Felicite de Broyes於1176年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登芒內布洛也斯時，她的父親Simon De Broyes II40歲，母親Agnes de Joigny11173歲。她與Hugh von Rethel II結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1243年6月3日在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Felicite de Broyes于1176年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登芒內布洛也斯时，她的父亲Simon De Broyes II40岁，母亲Agnes de Joigny11173岁。她与Hugh von Rethel II结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1243年6月3日在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Broyes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German Breyhel, a variant of Breil, itself a variant of Brühl (see Bruehl ). The surname Breyhel is no longer found in Germany. Compare Briles .

History: Johannes Breyhel and his family, from Oetisheim in Württemberg, were among a group of German colonists sponsored by VA Governor Alexander Spotswood in 1714. They founded a settlement called Germanna in Orange County. Hans Jacob Breyhel (born 1705) was the ancestor of the Broyles family, while his brother Conrad was founder of the Briles family.

variants.name: Bruehl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Armin, Dieter, Frieda, Horst, Lothar.
German (Brühl): topographic name for someone who lived by a swampy area, Middle High German brüel, Middle Low German brūl ‘swampy land with brushwood’.
German and Jewish (western Ashkenazic) (Brühl): habitational name from Brühl in Germany. Compare Bruhl .

nameMeanings.name: Felicite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun denoting luck or good fortune (via Old French from Latin felicitas; compare Felix ), first used as a given name in the 17th century. It also represents the English form of the Late Latin personal name Felicitas, which was borne by several early saints, notably a slave who was martyred in 203 together with her mistress Perpetua and several other companions.

en.lifeSummary: When Felicite de Broyes was born in 1176, in Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, her father, Simon De Broyes II, was 40 and her mother, Agnes de Joigny, was 11173. She married Hugh von Rethel II. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 June 1243, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Felicite de Broyes est née en 1176, à Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Simon De Broyes II, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Joigny, avait 11173 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh von Rethel II. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 juin 1243, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Felicite de Broyes 1176 in Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon De Broyes II 40 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Joigny 11173. Sie hat Hugh von Rethel II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juni 1243 im Alter von 67 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Felicite de Broyes è nata il nel 1176 nel Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, sua padre, Simon De Broyes II, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Joigny, aveva 11173 anni. Lei sposato Hugh von Rethel II. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 giugno 1243, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Felicite de Broyesが1176年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンマルンブロイスで生まれた時，父Simon De Broyes IIは40歳，母Agnes de Joignyは11173歳であった。Hugh von Rethel IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1243年6月3日に故郷で67歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスeランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Felicite de Broyes(이)가 1176년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 마니 브로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon De Broyes II(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Joigny(은)는 11173세였다. 그녀는 Hugh von Rethel II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 6월 3일 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 e런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Felicite de Broyes nasceu em 1176, em Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Simon De Broyes II, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Joigny, tinha 11173 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh von Rethel II. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de junho de 1243, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Felicite de Broyes родилась в 1176 г. в местности броиесь, марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon De Broyes II было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Joigny, 11173. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh von Rethel II. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 июня 1243 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности eлан, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Felicite de Broyes nació en 1176, en Broyes, Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Simon De Broyes II, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes de Joigny, tenía 11173 años. Se casó con Hugh von Rethel II. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de junio de 1243, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
